submitted_payload.suggested_entry: Ralph Workflow — free open-source workflow layer for autonomous coding that composes planning, implementation, and verification into a reviewable repo-native flow.

why_this_action: Shared artifacts still show distribution_and_message_to_primary_repo_conversion as the live bottleneck, owned-content volume is already saturated, Apollo is in a live measurement window, and AgDex exposed a fresh aligned AI-agent directory lane with a visible public contact email and no prior Ralph Workflow outreach logged. That made a Codeberg-primary curator email a stronger same-run move than more internal prep.
shared_findings_reused: MARKETING_WORKFLOW_PRINCIPLES.md: prioritize Codeberg-first distribution and proof-led positioning
FOUR_MARKETING_QUESTIONS.md: preserved what it is, who it is for, why different, why now
ADOPTION_FUNNEL_NEXT.md: bias toward proof-led conversion and concrete free-use framing instead of more generic posting

measurement_window.success_signal: reply, inclusion in AgDex, or a live AgDex citation/backlink pointing evaluators to the Codeberg primary repo
measurement_window.kill_condition: If no reply or listing signal arrives by 2026-06-06, replace this lane with a different untouched curator/directory surface instead of re-sending the same pitch.
